regional_cost_note: Interior designers in Whangārei typically charge $110–$190/hr or 10–20% of project value. A full residential interior design project typically costs $6,000–$35,000+ in fees. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Scope the engagement carefully — hourly rates suit small consultations; percentage-of-project suits full-service renovations.
